---
title: "Jiugeng Sun"
image: "files/images/profile.jpeg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: sun
      text: Lab
      href: https://ecology.ethz.ch/the-group.html
      target: _blank
    - icon: globe
      text: Uprofile
      href: https://ecology.ethz.ch/the-group.html
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: jiugeng.sun@inf.ehtz.ch    
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jiugeng-sun-259299148/
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0008-5896-4626
      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
#     href: https://www.scopus.com
#      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=E69oDAwAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Jiugeng-Sun
      target: _blank

listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a scientific assistant at [ETH Zürich](https://ethz.ch/en.html), jointly affiliated with [Ecosystem Management (EM) Group](https://ecology.ethz.ch/the-group.html), at the [Institute of Terrestrial Ecosystems (ITES)](https://ites.ethz.ch/), [Department of Environmental Systems Science (D-​USYS)](https://usys.ethz.ch/en/), 
and [Interactive Visualisation & Intelligence Augmentation (IVIA) Lab](https://ivia.ch/), at the [Visual Computing Institute](https://ivc.ethz.ch/), [Department of Computer Science](https://inf.ethz.ch/).
I am co-supervised by [Prof. Jaboury Ghazoul](https://usys.ethz.ch/en/people/profile.jghazoul.html) and [Prof. Mennatallah El-Assady](https://el-assady.com/). 

Prior to this, I obtained my Master degree in Computer Science at [Department of Computer Science](https://inf.ethz.ch/), [ETH Zürich](https://ethz.ch/en.html), with a specialisation on Visual and Interactive Computing. 
I obtained my Bachelor degree in Artificial Intelligence and Computer Science at [School of Informatics](https://informatics.ed.ac.uk/), [University of Edinburgh](https://www.ed.ac.uk/), where I worked with [Prof. Diego Oryazún](https://homepages.inf.ed.ac.uk/doyarzun/people/diego/) in [Biomolecular Control Group](https://homepages.inf.ed.ac.uk/doyarzun/).

My research interests lie at the intersection of **visual analytics** and **social intelligence**, with a focus on designing real-time interactive systems for analysing complex multi-party discourse. 
I am particularly interested in how visualisation and human-AI collaboration can surface latent patterns in conversation, such as evolving coalitions, alignment shifts, and argumentative structures, 
in ways that are both computationally tractable and cognitively manageable for human analysts. I am also working on human-AI **co-adptive guidance** visualisation toolkit for **landscape intervention**. More broadly, I am interested in **low-resourced NLP** and **AI for social good**, where I believe that 
computational technology should serve underrepresented communities, and that computational methods should be applied to problems with real societal and ecological stakes. 
I am keen on promoting **AI literacy** for all. Please contact me if you are interested in collaborating!

I love travelling and I love music :P


:::


<!-- Delete the following section and delete corresponding lines in the yaml part to remove the recent posts -->
## Recent Posts
Check out the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=paper)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[News](posts.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

<p align="right">[All Posts »](/posts.qmd)</p>
